elevenlabs-api.Title: ElevenLabs API
elevenlabs-api.JustificationCiaRating: Service receives sensitive note text and returns generated audio; availability directly impacts feature behavior.

obsidian-end-user.Title: Obsidian End User
obsidian-end-user.Description: Human user triggering text-to-speech actions from Obsidian UI.
obsidian-end-user.JustificationOutOfScope: Human actor operating the local Obsidian application.
obsidian-end-user.JustificationCiaRating: The user initiates processing and handles potentially sensitive note content in the local desktop environment.

CommunicationLinks.Title: Trigger TTS Command
CommunicationLinks.Description: User action triggers plugin command with selected note text.

obsidian-plugin-runtime.Title: Obsidian Plugin Runtime
obsidian-plugin-runtime.Description: TypeScript plugin logic running in Obsidian desktop runtime.
obsidian-plugin-runtime.JustificationCiaRating: Runtime processes selected text and API key, performs external API calls, and writes output files to the vault.

CommunicationLinks.Title: ElevenLabs TTS API Call
CommunicationLinks.Description: HTTPS request to synthesize note text into audio using API key.

CommunicationLinks.Title: Read or Write Vault Files
CommunicationLinks.Description: Local file operations for settings, logs, and generated audio.

obsidian-vault-storage.Title: Obsidian Vault Storage
obsidian-vault-storage.Description: Local vault filesystem containing notes, plugin data.json settings, and generated MP3 files.
obsidian-vault-storage.JustificationCiaRating: Stores plaintext plugin settings and API key in data.json and receives generated MP3 files in vault paths.
